nodes.name: Webhook — Receive Approved Ad
nodes.notes: OpenClaw or owner POSTs approved ad payload here. Required fields: campaign_type, primary_text, headline, description, cta_button, image_url, audience_id, ad_account_id, daily_budget_cents, platform

nodes.name: Validate Payload
nodes.notes: Validates all required fields are present before touching the Meta API

nodes.name: Create Campaign
nodes.notes: Creates the campaign shell. Status is PAUSED — only goes ACTIVE after full approval chain completes. CREDIT special ad category is mandatory for debt/credit services.

nodes.name: Create Ad Set
nodes.notes: Creates the ad set with targeting. Audience ID must be pre-built in Meta Ads Manager. Targeting defaults to US, age 25-55 — update geo_locations for local targeting.

nodes.name: Create Ad Creative
nodes.notes: Assembles the visual + copy into a creative object. image_url must be a publicly accessible URL. page_id and destination_url must be included in the webhook payload.

nodes.name: Create Ad
nodes.notes: Creates the final ad object linking the ad set and creative. Still PAUSED at this point.

nodes.name: Build Approval Payload
nodes.notes: Packages the campaign, ad set, and ad IDs into an approval payload for the Approval Router

nodes.name: Send to Approval Router
nodes.notes: Routes to the existing Approval Router workflow. Owner receives notification with ad details and approves or rejects.

nodes.name: Activate Ad
nodes.notes: Only reached if owner approves in the Approval Router. Sets ad status to ACTIVE — ad goes live.

nodes.name: Log Published Ad
nodes.notes: Builds a log entry for the published ads log

nodes.name: Write to Published Ads Log
nodes.notes: Appends the published ad record to OUTPUTS/published-ads.csv for tracking

parameters.responseBody: ={"status":"published","ad_id":"{{$('Build Approval Payload').item.json.ad_id}}","campaign_id":"{{$('Build Approval Payload').item.json.campaign_id}}","message":"Ad is now ACTIVE on Meta."}
={"status":"rejected","message":"Ad was rejected by owner. Campaign remains PAUSED in Meta Ads Manager."}

nodes.name: Respond — Rejected
nodes.notes: If owner rejects, ad stays PAUSED. No further action taken. Owner can delete from Meta Ads Manager manually.
